title: user.invited payload (v1)
description: A user was invited to a tenant. HONEST STATUS: this is a DECLARED-BUT-UNUSED contract. The USER_EVENTS stream (subjects tenant.*.user.>) is declared in packages/nats-client CORE_STREAMS and the typed UserInvitedPayloadSchema exists in packages/contracts, but NO service publishes user.invited and NO service subscribes to it today. identity-service's /internal/users/invite adds the user + sends in-app/email notices directly (via the gateway), not via this event. This schema documents the TYPED contract shape for when the event is wired.
x-producer: (none active — typed contract exists; not published today)
